algorithms.Duplicated.time_duplicated.name: algorithms.Duplicated.time_duplicated

algorithms.DuplicatedMaskedArray.time_du.code:
class DuplicatedMaskedArray:
    def time_duplicated(self, unique, keep, dtype):
        self.ser.duplicated(keep=keep)

def setup(*args, **kwargs):
    # This function just needs to be imported into each benchmark file to
    # set up the random seed before each function.
    # https://asv.readthedocs.io/en/latest/writing_benchmarks.html
    np.random.seed(1234)
    # Collect garbage before each timing sample so that bimodal results
    # from gen-0 collections firing mid-measurement are damped.
    gc.collect()

class DuplicatedMaskedArray:
    def setup(self, unique, keep, dtype):
        N = 10**5
        data = pd.Series(np.arange(N), dtype=dtype)
        data[list(range(1, N, 100))] = pd.NA
        if not unique:
            data = data.repeat(5)
        self.ser = data
        # cache is_unique
        self.ser.is_unique
algorithms.DuplicatedMaskedArray.time_du.name: algorithms.DuplicatedMaskedArray.time_duplicated

algorithms.Hashing.time_frame.code:
class Hashing:
    def time_frame(self, df):
        hashing.hash_pandas_object(df)

def setup(*args, **kwargs):
    # This function just needs to be imported into each benchmark file to
    # set up the random seed before each function.
    # https://asv.readthedocs.io/en/latest/writing_benchmarks.html
    np.random.seed(1234)
    # Collect garbage before each timing sample so that bimodal results
    # from gen-0 collections firing mid-measurement are damped.
    gc.collect()

class Hashing:
    def setup_cache(self):
        # setup_cache runs in a different sub-process where module-level setup is
        # never called,so seed locally to keep the cached frame reproducible
        # across runs.
        np.random.seed(1234)
        N = 10**5
    
        df = pd.DataFrame(
            {
                "strings": pd.Series(
                    pd.Index([f"i-{i}" for i in range(10000)], dtype=object).take(
                        np.random.randint(0, 10000, size=N)
                    )
                ),
                "floats": np.random.randn(N),
                "ints": np.arange(N),
                "dates": pd.date_range("20110101", freq="s", periods=N),
                "timedeltas": pd.timedelta_range("1 day", freq="s", periods=N),
            }
        )
        df["categories"] = df["strings"].astype("category")
        df.iloc[10:20] = np.nan
        return df
algorithms.Hashing.time_frame.name: algorithms.Hashing.time_frame
